description: Problem Management agent golden cases — eval-first contract tests before production

cases.name: First invocation — pauses for SME questions
cases.description: A fresh problem record submission must kick off Phase 1-2 then pause at Phase 3 to gather SME context before RCA.

input.title: QNXT claims adjudication failures during high-volume period
input.symptom_description: 30% of claims submitted between 09:00-11:00 fail with error code ADJUD-503. Workaround: manual requeue from operations team.

cases.name: Resume with SME context — completes RCA
cases.description: After Phase 3 pause, providing SME answers must allow the agent to complete root cause analysis and generate a KEDB entry.

input.human_context: Root cause traced to connection pool exhaustion in claims DB at peak load. Connection pool limit is 50; peak demand reaches 80. Config change in v3.2.1 reduced pool size without traffic review. SME owner: Raj Kumar (DB team). Known fix: increase pool to 150 + add circuit breaker. Estimated fix time: 4 hours with maintenance window.

cases.name: get_status — read-only, no phase execution
cases.description: get_status must return current state without invoking any Bedrock phases.

cases.name: Missing problem_id — structured error response
cases.description: Omitting problem_id must return a structured error, not a 500 or unhandled exception.

cases.name: Phase 2 classification assigns correct priority tier
cases.description: P1 severity + 2 enterprise customers + production environment must classify as CRITICAL tier.

input.title: Complete outage — payment processing unavailable
input.symptom_description: All payment transactions failing since 14:30. No workaround available.

cases.name: Phase 3 SME questions cover root cause, impact, workaround
cases.description: The 3 SME questions generated at Phase 3 must cover: root cause hypothesis, business impact scope, and existing workaround status.

input.title: Batch enrollment processing delay — 6-hour SLA breach
input.symptom_description: Nightly batch enrollment jobs running 4x slower than baseline for past 3 days. SLA requires completion by 06:00 but jobs finishing at 10:00.

cases.name: KEDB entry generated for known problem pattern
cases.description: A completed problem with clear root cause must produce a KEDB-formatted entry in the output.

input.title: Authentication token expiry causing session drops
input.symptom_description: Users experiencing forced logouts after exactly 4 hours. Token refresh not triggering. Affects all SSO-enabled environments.

cases.name: Report contains required ITIL sections
cases.description: After completion, the HTML report must contain: Problem Statement, Timeline, Root Cause, Impact Analysis, Resolution Steps, Prevention Measures, KEDB Reference.

cases.name: Phase 5 routes to correct LLMWiki domain for gap analysis
cases.description: For a claims processing problem, Phase 5 knowledge gap lookup must route to 'configuration' or 'data-migration' domain, not generic.

input.title: QNXT configuration drift causing data mapping errors post-upgrade
input.symptom_description: After v8.1 upgrade, member eligibility lookups returning stale data. Configuration tables not refreshed during cutover.

cases.name: Governance — cost row written for PM invocation
cases.description: Each PM harness invocation must write a usage record to llmwiki-usage DynamoDB with correct caller_tag.

input.title: Governance cost tracking test
input.symptom_description: Synthetic test problem for governance validation only.
